Amazon deforestation implications in local/regional climate change

Paulo Artaxo Authors Info & Affiliations
Amazonia and the tropical forests are full of scientific surprises, with important environmental and climatic impacts that range from local to regional and global. This commentary discusses how deforestation changes regional warming and climate resilience across the basin.
The piece does not contain an abstract or internal body headings. It moves directly from the article title into continuous prose, which makes it a stable regression case for headingless-body rendering.
